stemHtml: Turbine blade stages may be classed as either "impulse" or "reaction". In an impulse turbine stage…

options.a: the pressure remains constant across the stator blades and drops across the rotor blades.
options.b: the pressure remains constant across stator blades and rises across the rotor blades.
options.c: the pressure rises across the stator blades and remains constant across the rotor blades.
options.d: the pressure drops across the stator blades and remains constant across the rotor blades.
